mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCategoryMapper.selectFrontCategoryList */ SELECT CATEGORY_SEQ /**/ , NAME /**/ , ICON_URL /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM CATEGORY

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCategoryMapper.selectFrontCategoryPage */ SELECT CATEGORY_SEQ /**/ , NAME /**/ , ICON_URL /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM CATEGORY

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCategoryMapper.selectFrontCategory */ SELECT CATEGORY_SEQ /**/ , NAME /**/ , ICON_URL /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM CATEGORY WHERE CATEGORY_SEQ = #{categorySeq}
mapper.update: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCategoryMapper.updateFrontCategory */ UPDATE CATEGORY SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , NAME = #{name} /**/ , ICON_URL = #{iconUrl} /**/ WHERE CATEGORY_SEQ = #{categorySeq}

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCategoryMapper.deleteFrontCategory */ UPDATE CATEGORY SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , USE_YN = FALSE WHERE CATEGORY_SEQ = #{categorySeq}
